description: Whether hooks communicate with the host via structured JSON on stdin/stdout rather than plain text or exit codes alone.

amp.mechanism: Amp hooks communicate via exit codes; no JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

claude-code.mechanism: Command hooks receive event JSON on stdin; respond with JSON on stdout (exit 0); structured fields: continue, stopReason, suppressOutput, systemMessage, hookSpecificOutput

cline.mechanism: Cline hooks communicate via exit codes and output text; no structured JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

codex.mechanism: Codex hooks communicate via exit codes and stdout text; no structured JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks communicate via exit codes; no JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

gemini-cli.mechanism: hook_io_protocol: Gemini CLI hooks receive event data as JSON on stdin and return structured JSON responses on stdout

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks communicate via exit codes; no JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

windsurf.mechanism: json_stdin_context: Windsurf hooks receive event context as JSON on stdin
